trivia_bullets.text: Canyon Vaulter is typed Kor Pilot — a 3/1 for {1}{W}. The Kor are a nomadic humanoid race native to Zendikar, described as masters of ropes and hooks who travel pilgrimage routes across treacherous terrain. Canyon Vaulter is a Kor appearing far from Zendikar, competing in the Ghirapur Grand Prix on Avishkar.

Whenever Canyon Vaulter saddles a Mount or crews a Vehicle during your main phase, that permanent gains flying until end of turn, turning any ground-locked Mount or Vehicle airborne without needing a dedicated flying strategy. EDHREC rank 14,487 — highest Commander adoption in this batch of 8, likely due to the broadly useful flying-grant ability.
"Some seek thrills in watching the show. Some seek thrills in being the show." Unattributed. Captures the Grand Prix spectacle ethos: the race is entertainment and the drivers are the entertainment.

Canyon Vaulter was previewed by Quest Daily on 2025-01-23. The Aetherdrift Mechanics article notes Pilot creatures throughout the set crew and saddle as if their power were 2 greater on relevant token effects — Canyon Vaulter as a named Pilot creature type is the non-token implementation of that design theme.
